name: sessionmovie
description: Turn a Claude Code session transcript into a 45-60s rendered movie.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test scripts/golden.test.ts src/voiceover/voiceover.test.ts src/voiceover/sync.test.ts src/genre/rules.test.ts src/screenwriter/punchup.test.ts src/quantize.test.ts src/facts/facts.test.ts
